task_completion.description: Configure Strategy Analyzer with the correct strategy, instrument, timeframe, and date range.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Strategy Analyzer window is visible. In the settings pane, 'SampleMACrossover' is selected as the strategy, Instrument is 'MSFT', Type is 'Day' (or Daily), and the date range is set from '1/1/2024' (or '1/2/2024') to '12/31/2024'.

task_completion.description: Run the backtest and display the results on a chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Chart' display is active within the Strategy Analyzer, showing a candlestick chart for MSFT with visual trade execution markers (e.g., arrows or lines indicating where the strategy bought and sold).

task_completion.description: Configure a 50-period Simple Moving Average (SMA) indicator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Indicators' dialog window is open showing 'SMA' added to the configured indicators list with the 'Period' parameter set to '50', OR the chart legend explicitly displays 'SMA(50)'.

task_completion.description: The 50-period SMA is plotted on the backtest chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A continuous moving average line is visibly plotted over the price candlesticks on the Strategy Analyzer chart.

task_completion.description: Export the chart image to the specified directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or export dialog box showing the filename 'MSFT_Backtest_Context.png' being saved in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\Analysis' folder, or a File Explorer window showing the successfully created image file in that exact path.

integrity.description: Agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through NinjaTrader 8 menus (e.g., opening Strategy Analyzer, right-clicking the chart to add indicators, using the save/export image function) rather than using terminal commands.

integrity.description: The exported file is a genuine chart image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The saved file 'MSFT_Backtest_Context.png' is an actual image file containing the NinjaTrader chart interface, candlesticks, SMA line, and trade markers, not a blank file or a text file renamed to .png.

integrity.description: Agent navigated to the correct directory in the GUI save dialog.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save dialog explicitly shows navigation to the 'Analysis' folder inside the 'NinjaTrader 8' Documents directory, rather than the agent just typing a mock path into a terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Strategy 'SampleMACrossover' is a built-in NinjaTrader 8 strategy. 'MSFT' has verified daily data ending on 2024-12-31. The task requests a start date of 2024-01-01, but the first trading day of the year was 2024-01-02, so the backtest data will start on Jan 2. The indicator is the Simple Moving Average (SMA) with a period of 50.
